summary: iter195 FM-Upgrade 2+3+3.5+4+5+6 comprehensive testing complete. All 52 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Activity Timeline panel verified with live feed showing all test events. All new features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All FM-Upgrade 2-6 features implemented correctly and working
RecipeNode graph cascade propagation works correctly (dirty_recipes includes both parent and child recipes)
Cycle detection correctly rejects self-referencing sub_recipes with 400
FDA 21 CFR 101 ingredient_statement sorted by descending weight
All 14 Fresh Meal endpoints return 200 OK
Pack lifecycle transitions emit correct TimelineEvents with TLCs in payload
Temp excursion auto-emits pack.temp_excursion when temp_c > 7 or < -1
FDA recall export returns in <2ms (well under 2000ms target)
FDA CSV export has all 14 required columns
Channels type validation correctly rejects invalid types
Kitchen Calendar today returns correct day_type with hint
Echo Permission Ladder correctly enforces rung requirements (po_execution_under_threshold at rung=1 rejects execute which needs rung>=3)
Benchmark.tsx component enforces Glass-Box UX contract with required props and testids
seed_data_creation: Created test packs, production runs, products, channels, safety records during testing (all prefixed with TEST_iter195)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter195 fully tested. FM-Upgrade 2-6 complete. Key features: (1) RecipeNode graph at /api/recipe-graph/* with cascade propagation, cycle detection, FDA 21 CFR 101 ingredient_statement. Demo seeded via POST /seed-demo. (2) Pack primitive at /api/fresh-meals/packs with lifecycle transitions emitting TimelineEvents. 14 Fresh Meal endpoints all working. (3) FDA 24-hour recall export at /api/compliance/fda-recall/export with JSON+CSV formats, <2ms performance. (4) Channels at /api/channels with type validation. Kitchen Calendar at /api/kitchen-calendar with today endpoint returning day_type+hint. (5) Echo Permission Ladder at /api/echo/capabilities with check endpoint enforcing rung requirements. (6) Benchmark.tsx Glass-Box UX contract component ready for use. MOCKED: FCM/APNs push, Twilio SMS, Resend emails (all queued until keys arrive).
